subject: The stores growing fastest in your category all did one thing differently
body:
Hi [Name],

Spent some time looking at the top performers in your category over the last 12 months. The ones that grew 3x+ had one thing in common: they stopped treating all customers the same.

While most stores ran blanket promotions, winners segmented by purchase history and lifetime value — sending different offers to different cohorts. Conversion lifted 40–60% on the same traffic.

[Product] builds these segments automatically and runs the campaigns without manual setup. One brand in your space went from 2% to 7% repeat purchase rate in 90 days.

Want to see how it would work for your catalog?
why_it_works: story-based — competitive observation + mechanism + specific metric improvement
